title: Amazon Aurora DB Cluster
description: Schema defining the structure of an Amazon Aurora DB cluster resource, including cluster configuration, instances, endpoints, storage, backup, and security settings.

DBClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB cluster.

Engine.description: The database engine for the DB cluster.

EngineVersion.description: The version of the database engine.

Status.description: The current state of the DB cluster.

Endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the primary instance of the DB cluster.

ReaderEndpoint.description: The reader endpoint for the DB cluster.

Port.description: The port that the database engine is listening on.

MasterUsername.description: The master username for the DB cluster.

DatabaseName.description: The name of the initial database created when the cluster was created.

DBClusterMembers.description: The list of DB instances that make up the DB cluster.

AvailabilityZones.description: The list of Availability Zones that instances in the DB cluster can be created in.

BackupRetentionPeriod.description: The number of days for which automatic DB snapshots are retained.

PreferredBackupWindow.description: The daily time range during which automated backups are created.

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur.

StorageEncrypted.description: Whether the DB cluster is encrypted.

KmsKeyId.description: The AWS KMS key identifier for the encrypted DB cluster.

DeletionProtection.description: Whether the DB cluster has deletion protection enabled.

VpcSecurityGroups.description: The list of VPC security groups that the DB cluster belongs to.

DBSubnetGroup.description: The name of the DB subnet group associated with the DB cluster.

ClusterCreateTime.description: The time when the DB cluster was created.

Tags.description: Tags associated with the DB cluster.

DBClusterMember.description: A member of a DB cluster.

DBInstanceIdentifier.description: The instance identifier for the DB cluster member.

IsClusterWriter.description: Whether the cluster member is the primary instance.

DBClusterParameterGroupStatus.description: The status of the DB cluster parameter group.

PromotionTier.description: The failover priority order for the DB instance.

VpcSecurityGroupMembership.description: A VPC security group associated with the DB cluster.

VpcSecurityGroupId.description: The name of the VPC security group.

Status.description: The membership status of the VPC security group.

Tag.description: A key-value pair for tagging AWS resources.
